summary:
# Austrian Grand Prix Preview

Extreme heat transforms Spielberg into a championship crucible as McLaren and Red Bull wage an intense battle for pace supremacy in scorching conditions that could reshape the title fight. Alpine and Haas clash in the midfield dogfight while stewards navigate controversial precedent-setting decisions that threaten to unsettle competitive balance. A dominant performance or strategic miscalculation in these sweltering temperatures could dramatically swing momentum in the constructors' championship with seven races remaining.
